name: Royal Sapphire Ring
description: An exquisite hand-crafted sterling silver ring set with a vibrant Kashmir sapphire. A timeless piece of elegance.

name: Emerald Gold Bracelet
description: A stunning 22K gold bracelet adorned with hand-picked natural emeralds, crafted by master artisans of Azad Kashmir.

name: Pearl Cascade Necklace
description: A graceful cascade of freshwater pearls accented with 18K gold fittings. Elegance in every bead.

name: Ruby Blossom Earrings
description: Delicate gold earrings featuring natural rubies shaped into a blooming flower – a symbol of Kashmiri craftsmanship.
